intentSynonyms: get a property estimate in redfin
look up a property estimate in redfin
fetch a single property estimate in redfin
view one specific property estimate in redfin
get redfin estimate and comparable homes in redfin
description: Get the Redfin Estimate (automated home valuation) for a property, along with comparable properties used to determine the estimate. The Redfin Estimate is a proprietary AVM that predicts current market value.
